title: /expense Telegram command returns "Failed to query expenses" — /api/expenses and /api/meal-plans never mounted (double-/api prefix)

completedPhaseClaims.evidence: report.md#audit-2026-06-01 (artifact-lint EXIT=0; traceability-guard RESULT: PASSED, 0 warnings, EXIT=0)

unresolvedFindings.dodRef: scopes.md Scope 1 DoD — Live home-lab GET /api/expenses returns 401 without bearer
unresolvedFindings.acceptanceCriteria: After ./smackerel.sh deploy-target home-lab apply with image carrying the BUG-034-003 fix, capture `curl -i http://<home-lab-host>/api/expenses` showing HTTP/1.1 401 (was 404 pre-fix). Paste raw response into report.md and tick scopes.md DoD + uservalidation.md item.
unresolvedFindings.note: In-process regression proven via internal/api/router_mount_bug_034_003_test.go (PASS); requires fresh image build + adapter apply on home-lab, which is operator-gated per deploy adapter policy.

unresolvedFindings.dodRef: scopes.md Scope 1 DoD — Live home-lab GET /api/meal-plans returns 401 without bearer
unresolvedFindings.acceptanceCriteria: After home-lab redeploy, capture `curl -i http://<home-lab-host>/api/meal-plans` showing HTTP/1.1 401 (was 404 pre-fix). Paste raw response into report.md and tick scopes.md DoD + uservalidation.md item.
unresolvedFindings.note: Same root cause as LIVE-001; covered by the same in-process adversarial sub-test for /api/api/meal-plans.

unresolvedFindings.dodRef: scopes.md Scope 1 DoD — Live Telegram /expense returns empty-state, not 'Failed to query expenses'
unresolvedFindings.acceptanceCriteria: After home-lab redeploy, send /expense to the home-lab Telegram bot. Expected reply: empty-state message (e.g. 'No expenses yet') or formatted list — NOT 'Failed to query expenses'. Capture Telegram screenshot or `docker logs smackerel-home-lab-smackerel-core-1` showing `GET /api/expenses status=200` and update report.md + uservalidation.md.
unresolvedFindings.note: End-user-visible confirmation; cannot be executed by an agent.

routing.reason: Certified done with auditVerdict=passed-with-known-drift (precedent: BUG-045-002). Engineering fix shipped and proven via in-process adversarial regression (internal/api/router_mount_bug_034_003_test.go — TestRouterMount_BUG_034_003 + 4 sub-tests PASS). Three remaining live-host DoD items (LIVE-001/002/003) strictly require operator-run home-lab redeploy via ./smackerel.sh deploy-target home-lab apply and are recorded as certification.unresolvedFindings with concrete acceptance criteria.
